summary: Completed frontend testing of GPGT E-commerce platform. Admin panel functionalities and COD checkout flow tested successfully.

ui_bugs.issue: Shop Now button has overlay interception issues preventing clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Navigation via header menu works correctly

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with hero section and categories
Admin login with admin@gpgt.ae / admin123 works successfully
Admin dashboard displays stats (8 products, 1 orders, 1 customers, AED 0.00 revenue)
Admin products management page shows 8 products with edit/delete options
Admin orders management page shows 1 order with status management
Admin categories management page displays 8 categories with edit/delete options
Admin settings page loads with payment toggles (Online Payment and COD enabled)
Frontend products page displays 8 products correctly
Product detail page loads with add to cart functionality
Add to cart functionality works correctly
Shopping cart displays items with quantity controls and pricing
Checkout form accepts customer information (name, phone, address)
COD order placement successful with order confirmation
Order confirmation page shows order number GPGT-20260203-64012613 with COD payment
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix hero section overlay issue preventing Shop Now button clicks. Consider adjusting z-index or carousel timing to prevent element interception.
